changelog: 📌 Create a backup of your system before updating.
📌 Close the application before installing the update.
📌 Do not modify or rename files inside the update package.
📌 Ensure a stable internet connection during download.
⚠ Student attendance records will remain unchanged.
⚠ Database structure will not be affected by this update.
⚠ Do not interrupt the update process once started.
⚠ Contact the administrator if any issues occur after updating.
